summary: Excellent audience‑matrix recording with crystal‑clear bass and vivid room ambience; Jerry shines on a monster Bird Song and the crowd‑loving Cold Rain and Snow.
review: Both reviewers rave about this show, calling it a true "Jerry show" with stellar guitar work and vocals. The recording is praised as one of the best‑sounding audience mixes, offering clear bass, audible crowd ambience, and room reverb that captures the live energy. Standout moments include an epic Bird Song and a powerful rendition of Cold Rain and Snow.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews highlight a superb performance and an outstanding recording, giving the show near‑perfect combined scores.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear bass, vivid audience sound, room reverbs present; described as the most dynamic audience mix among available recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy set dominated by Jerry's guitar and vocals, with strong crowd interaction and seamless transitions that keep the momentum rolling.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Stellar guitar work and vocals all night; described as being "on his game" and a true monster performance.
